name: SkillsForAgents
description: A growing collection of agent skills (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes). Drop-in productivity, research, and voice-agent tooling.

plugins.name: session-journal
plugins.description: Record and archive work sessions into an Obsidian-style brain/wiki. Triggers: 'Hey Claude, let's go!' / 'I'm done for today'.

plugins.name: wiki-save
plugins.description: Save content into an Obsidian-style brain/wiki on request. Triggers: 'save this', 'save to wiki', '/save'.

plugins.name: magic-content
plugins.description: Interactive research pipeline: discover YouTube/Web/PDF sources, generate artifacts with NotebookLM, review, ingest into your wiki.

plugins.name: magic-web
plugins.description: Interactive builder for immersive scroll-driven hero websites — 100% Gemini API. Topic → 4 prompts → 2 frames (Nano Banana 2 or Pro) → 8s 1080p video (Veo 3.1 Fast or Lite) → cropped to 1920×1004 → all 30fps frames → Antigravity-CLI website. Choose AI Studio key or Vertex AI auth, choose model tier, see cost up front.

plugins.name: vapi-build
plugins.description: End-to-end builder for production Vapi voice agents with custom n8n tools.
